script.openingLine: A round-of-32 meeting at Los Angeles Stadium: Spain against Austria, with the replay ready to unfold.

moments.spokenLine: Spain meet Austria in the round of 32 at Los Angeles Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay opens with the confirmed fixture and setting.

moments.spokenLine: Mikel OYARZABAL scores for Spain, and the verified score moves to 1–0.
moments.explainer: Spain take the lead, creating the first decisive swing of the match.

moments.spokenLine: Spain lead Austria 1–0 at the interval.
moments.explainer: The half-time score confirms Spain’s advantage after the opening goal.

moments.spokenLine: Pedro PORRO scores for Spain, and the verified score moves to 2–0.
moments.explainer: Spain double their lead, strengthening their position in the match.

moments.spokenLine: Stefan POSCH is shown a card for Austria.
moments.explainer: Austria receive a disciplinary moment as Spain continue to lead 2–0.

moments.spokenLine: Mikel OYARZABAL scores again for Spain, and the verified score moves to 3–0.
moments.explainer: Oyarzabal’s second goal takes Spain three clear and settles the final scoreline.

moments.spokenLine: Spain complete a 3–0 victory over Austria.
moments.explainer: The final whistle confirms Spain’s three-goal win in the round of 32.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Spain meet Austria in the round of 32 at Los Angeles Stadium.
In the 36th minute, Mikel OYARZABAL scores for Spain, and the verified score moves to 1–0.
In the 66th minute, Pedro PORRO scores for Spain, and the verified score moves to 2–0.
In the 83rd minute, Stefan POSCH is shown a card for Austria.
In the 89th minute, Mikel OYARZABAL scores again for Spain, and the verified score moves to 3–0.
At full-time, Spain complete a 3–0 victory over Austria.
